## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:` …)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint && npm run typecheck` pass
- [ ] `npm run format` run
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour changed
